creator: hostmaster@iecc.com
text:
The editors/xxe port is currently marked broken due to the distfile
being unfetchable. They just renamed it when they moved to version 4.9.1.

Attached is a shar with updated Makefile, Makefile.inc, and distinfo.

The doc says it needs Java 1.6 so I adjusted the Makefile to reflect that.

Fix: 

Replace Makefile, Makefile.inc, and distinfo with files in attached shar
How-To-Repeat: Try to install or update xxe
